task_description: Evaluate container orchestration platforms for a healthcare SaaS company migrating from virtual machines, and recommend the best option.

input_data.context: A healthcare SaaS company running 40 microservices on VMs wants to adopt container orchestration. The platform must meet HIPAA compliance requirements, support blue-green deployments, handle sensitive patient data encryption at rest and in transit, and integrate with existing CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions. The operations team has 3 DevOps engineers. Monthly infrastructure budget is $15,000.
